subject: Cannot login to platform
message: All users in our organization are locked out since 2am. Authentication is completely broken.

subject: Duplicate charge on my account
message: I was charged twice this month. Please refund the duplicate charge.

subject: How do I export my data?
message: I want to download all my data from the platform. Where can I find the export option?

subject: SSO integration broken
message: Our SAML SSO stopped working after your update last night. 500 users cannot access the system.

subject: Feature request: dark mode
message: It would be great to have a dark mode option in the dashboard.

subject: Password reset not working
message: I tried to reset my password but never received the email.

subject: Data not loading
message: Our dashboard has been showing a spinning loader for 2 hours. No data is appearing.

subject: Cancel my subscription
message: I want to cancel my Pro subscription and get a refund for this month.

subject: App is very slow
message: Everything takes forever to load today. Is there an outage?

subject: API returning 401 errors
message: All API calls are returning 401 unauthorized since midnight. Our entire integration is down.

subject: Wrong invoice amount
message: My invoice shows $99 but I should be on the $49 plan. Please correct this.

subject: Can I upgrade to Pro?
message: I want to know what features I get if I upgrade to the Pro plan.

subject: Bulk import failing
message: Our nightly data import job has been failing for 3 days with a 500 error.

subject: Add API rate limit increase
message: We need higher API rate limits for our use case. Can this be increased?

subject: How do I invite team members?
message: I want to add my colleagues to my workspace. How do I send invitations?

subject: MFA not working for users
message: Multi-factor authentication codes are being rejected for our entire team.

subject: Report export is broken
message: When I click export to CSV nothing happens. This worked last week.

subject: Forgot my username
message: I cannot remember the email I used to sign up. How can I find my account?

subject: Compliance report needed urgently
message: We need a SOC2 compliance report by end of day for our audit.

subject: Integration with Slack
message: Is there a Slack integration available? I would love to get notifications in Slack.

subject: Login page returning 500
message: Our login page is throwing a 500 internal server error. No one can access the system.

subject: Refund request
message: I signed up by mistake and would like a full refund. I have not used the service.

subject: How do I change my email?
message: I want to update the email address on my account.

subject: OAuth tokens expired
message: All OAuth tokens for our enterprise account expired simultaneously. Users cannot authenticate.

subject: Dashboard loading very slowly
message: The main dashboard takes 30 seconds to load. This started yesterday.

subject: What is the storage limit?
message: I want to know how much storage I get on the free plan.

subject: Webhook authentication failing
message: All webhook callbacks are returning 403 forbidden. Our integrations are broken.

subject: Add custom domain support
message: We would like to use our own domain name for the platform. Is this possible?

subject: Cannot upload files
message: I keep getting an error when trying to upload a PDF. It just says upload failed.

subject: Session tokens invalidated
message: All active user sessions were invalidated without warning. All 200 users logged out simultaneously.

subject: Billing cycle question
message: When does my billing cycle renew each month? I want to plan my usage accordingly.

subject: Is there a mobile app?
message: Do you have an iOS or Android app I can use on my phone?

subject: LDAP sync broken
message: Our LDAP directory sync has stopped working. New employees cannot get accounts.

subject: Data export missing fields
message: When I export my data to CSV, several columns are missing compared to what I see on screen.

subject: How do I delete my account?
message: I want to permanently delete my account and all my data.

subject: IP whitelist not working
message: We added new IP ranges to our whitelist but users from those IPs still cannot authenticate.

subject: Request for annual billing
message: Can I switch from monthly to annual billing to save money?

subject: Charts not displaying
message: All charts on my dashboard are blank. I can see the data in tables but not charts.

subject: Certificate authentication failing
message: Client certificate authentication stopped working for all enterprise users after your maintenance window.

subject: Need more user seats
message: We need to add 10 more user seats to our Pro plan. How do we do this?

subject: Notifications not working
message: I am not receiving any email notifications even though they are enabled in my settings.

subject: Two factor auth broken
message: 2FA is rejecting valid codes for all enterprise users. We are completely locked out.

subject: API documentation request
message: Where can I find the full API documentation? The link on your website seems broken.

subject: Can I share my account?
message: Is it allowed to share my login with a colleague or do we each need an account?

subject: Token refresh endpoint down
message: The OAuth token refresh endpoint is returning 503. All our applications are losing authentication.

subject: Incorrect tax on invoice

subject: Search not returning results
message: When I search for anything I get no results even though I know the data is there.

subject: Active Directory integration down
message: Our AD integration has stopped syncing. Users created in AD are not appearing in the platform.

subject: Webhook endpoint configuration

subject: Page returns 404
message: I bookmarked a page in your app and now it returns 404. Did something move?

subject: Permissions not applying
message: Role-based permissions changes are not taking effect. Users still have access they should not have.

subject: Request white label option
message: We would like to white label the platform with our own branding for our clients.

subject: How do I reset my password?
message: I forgot my password and need to reset it. What is the process?

message: Our security team cannot access audit logs for the past 48 hours. This is a compliance issue.

subject: Upgrade to Enterprise
message: We are growing and want to discuss upgrading to an Enterprise plan. Who should I talk to?

subject: Data not saving
message: I keep filling in a form and clicking save but my changes are not being saved.

subject: SSO certificate expired
message: Our SSO certificate has expired and users are getting certificate errors when trying to log in.

subject: Bulk user import feature
message: We need to import 50 users at once. Is there a bulk import option?

subject: How do I use the API?
message: I want to integrate your platform with my app. Where do I start with the API?

subject: Login service degraded
message: We are seeing intermittent authentication failures affecting about 30 percent of our users.

subject: Charged after cancellation
message: I cancelled my subscription last month but was still charged this month. Please refund immediately.

subject: Feature suggestion for reporting
message: It would be useful to have scheduled reports sent automatically by email each week.

subject: API key authentication broken
message: All API keys for our enterprise account are returning invalid key errors. Nothing changed on our end.

subject: Wrong data in report

subject: Account locked out

subject: Provisioning API down
message: Our automated user provisioning via SCIM API is returning errors. We cannot onboard new employees.

subject: Add more storage
message: We are running out of storage on our Pro plan. Can we purchase additional storage?

subject: Typo on your pricing page
message: I noticed a typo on your pricing page. The word Professional is spelled wrong.

subject: All users logged out
message: Every single user in our organization was simultaneously logged out 20 minutes ago and cannot log back in.

subject: Need invoice for tax purposes
message: I need a detailed invoice for last quarter for my tax filing. Can you send one?

subject: App crashes on mobile
message: The mobile web app crashes every time I try to open the settings page on my iPhone.

subject: Password policy not enforcing
message: Our enterprise password policy settings are not being enforced. Users can set weak passwords.

subject: Zapier integration not working
message: Our Zapier integration stopped triggering yesterday. No zaps have fired in 24 hours.

subject: Session management failure
message: Users are being logged out every few minutes. Session persistence is broken for our entire account.

subject: Request for SLA documentation
message: We need your SLA documentation for an internal compliance review.

subject: Cannot connect to API
message: I keep getting connection refused errors when trying to call your API from my app.

message: Federated identity login through our identity provider has stopped working completely.

subject: Add custom fields to profile
message: We need to add custom fields to user profiles to store internal employee IDs.

subject: Email verification not arriving

subject: Integration with Google Sheets

subject: Auth service 502 errors
message: Our monitoring shows the auth service returning 502 errors intermittently for the last hour.

subject: Data import taking too long
message: I started a data import 3 hours ago and it is still running. Is this normal for 10000 records?

subject: How long are logs retained?
message: How long does your platform keep activity logs? I need to know for compliance reasons.

subject: SSO loop on login
message: Users are getting stuck in an infinite redirect loop when attempting SSO login.

subject: Keyboard shortcuts not working
message: The keyboard shortcuts listed in your documentation do not seem to work for me.

subject: Biometric auth integration broken
message: Our hardware security key and biometric authentication integration stopped working after last night's update.

subject: Can I use this for my business?
message: I run a small business. Is the free plan suitable for business use or do I need to upgrade?

subject: JWT validation failing
message: JWT token validation is failing for all API requests. Our entire backend integration is broken.

subject: Notification preferences not saving
message: Every time I update my notification preferences they reset back to the defaults.

message: I am a student and wondering if you offer any discounts for educational use.

message: Passkey authentication is not working for any of our enterprise users since the last deployment.

subject: Export to PDF broken
message: The export to PDF button generates a blank PDF with no content.

message: Our security team sees unusual login patterns in the audit log. We suspect a breach.

subject: Add team permissions
message: We need more granular permissions for our team. Currently everyone has the same access level.
